Bash(cat >> /Users/adityatiwari/Adpilot/prisma/schema.prisma << 'PRISMA'

model TeamInvite {
  id        String    @id @default\(uuid\(\)\)
  teamId    String    @map\("team_id"\)
  email     String
  role      String    @default\("member"\)
  token     String    @unique
  expiresAt DateTime  @map\("expires_at"\)
  usedAt    DateTime? @map\("used_at"\)
  createdAt DateTime  @default\(now\(\)\) @map\("created_at"\)

  team Team @relation\(fields: [teamId], references: [id]\)

  @@index\([teamId, email]\)
  @@index\([token]\)
  @@map\("team_invites"\)
}

model AuditLog {
  id         String   @id @default\(uuid\(\)\)
  teamId     String   @map\("team_id"\)
  userId     String?  @map\("user_id"\)
  action     String
  resource   String
  resourceId String?  @map\("resource_id"\)
  metadata   Json     @default\("{}"\) @db.JsonB
  ipAddress  String?  @map\("ip_address"\)
  userAgent  String?  @map\("user_agent"\)
  createdAt  DateTime @default\(now\(\)\) @map\("created_at"\)

  team Team @relation\(fields: [teamId], references: [id]\)

  @@index\([teamId, createdAt]\)
  @@index\([userId, createdAt]\)
  @@map\("audit_logs"\)
}
PRISMA
echo "Schema appended")

const prisma = require\('./src/config/prisma'\);
prisma.seoAudit.create\({ data: { teamId: 'test-fake', url: 'https://test.com', status: 'pending', engineVersion: 2 } }\)
  .then\(r => { console.log\('Create worked, id:', r.id\); return prisma.seoAudit.delete\({where:{id:r.id}}\); }\)
  .then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Cleanup done'\); process.exit\(0\); }\)
  .catch\(e => { console.error\('PRISMA ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);
" 2>&1)
